decision_commentary: Two bids compared: Constructora Pacífico BCS (MXN 8,150,000, 52 weeks) and Ingeniería y Construcción del Sur (MXN 8,580,000, 48 weeks). Both bids have full line_items (8 scope areas each), timeline, and notes. Recommendation: Constructora Pacífico BCS. Rationale goes beyond lowest price — coastal zone permit experience explicitly cited (12 years coastal residential in BCS, familiar with SEMARNAT requirements vs competitor's 'less prior SEMARNAT/coastal zone permit experience'). Both bids below budget-alignment revised estimate of MXN 8,200,000 — confirmed in rationale. Marcela can select immediately. Both bids include exclusions noted (solar specialty contractor, interior FF&E). State sync scored 4 — Asana GIDs 1213707831348138 (bidding) and 1213707881896836 (contractor_selection_gate) confirmed in state.json. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: Celia DG-11 routing verified in separate scorecard.
